run: group1 re-cert batch 2 (rc2) — Papers 42,43,44,53 + synthesis (Lorentzian foundations + disk), 2026-06-19
note: C15 (inline-arXiv) is a deterministic, pre-validated gate (test_inline_arxiv_check.py 4/4, incl. the 2504.10830<->2504.10380 transposition); it does not need per-run LLM calibration. An attempted in-run C15 seed (p42 inline transposition) was a DUD and reverted: p42's van den Dungen bibitem omits the arXiv ID, so there was no bibitem ID to near-match (C15 correctly requires one). The 4 seeds below calibrate the 4 LLM dimensions.

C9 — Lorentzian Λ-inheritance flipped from 'is descoped while the cocycle-deficit algebra survives' to 'is established while ...'.
